stemHtml: Which describes a Performance Class B aircraft?

options.a: Propeller engines, 9 persons or fewer, 5700 kg or less.
options.b: Jet engines, 9 persons or fewer, 5700 kg or less.
options.c: Jet engines, 9 persons or more, 5700 kg or more.
options.d: Propeller engines, 9 persons or more, 5700 kg or less.
